---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for Agent Console
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem / Motivation
Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. "I always have to..."

## Proposed Solution
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered
Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Case
How would this feature be used? What workflow does it enable?

## Agent(s) Affected
Which agents would benefit from this feature?
- [ ] Claude Code
- [ ] Gemini CLI
- [ ] Codex CLI
- [ ] OpenCode
- [ ] All agents

## Additional Context
Any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request.
